tasks.title: Custom tool discovery scans TOOL.md instead of .ts/.js
tasks.description: Custom tool discovery scans TOOL.md instead of .ts/.js files. The tool discovery mechanism should scan for .ts and .js files, not TOOL.md documentation files.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: verify tool discovery finds .ts/.js files in tool directories
AddRegressionTest: ensure TOOL.md files are not treated as tool source files
RunTestSuite: execute tool discovery tests to confirm correct file filtering
tasks.impl_notes: Module: tools. Check file extension filtering in tool scanner implementation.

tasks.title: Custom tools not registered with ToolRegistry
tasks.description: Custom tools are not being registered with the ToolRegistry, causing them to be unavailable at runtime.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: verify custom tools appear in ToolRegistry listing
AddRegressionTest: ensure custom tools can be executed via registry
RunTestSuite: execute tool registration tests
tasks.impl_notes: Module: tools. Ensure custom tool loader calls ToolRegistry::register().

tasks.title: Plugin tool registration missing
tasks.description: Plugin tool registration is missing, preventing plugins from exposing their tools to the agent runtime.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: verify plugin tools are exposed via plugin registry
AddRegressionTest: ensure plugins can register multiple tools
RunTestSuite: execute plugin integration tests
tasks.impl_notes: Module: plugin. Check plugin_init() registers tools with ToolRegistry.

tasks.title: Fix Duplicate directory_scanner.rs
tasks.description: There is a duplicate directory_scanner.rs file causing compilation issues. Need to consolidate into single location in config/core.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: verify directory scanning works from single location
RunTestSuite: cargo build succeeds without duplicate file errors
AddUnitTest: verify directory scanner finds files correctly
tasks.impl_notes: Module: config/core. Remove duplicate, keep single source of truth.

tasks.title: Audit Two ToolRegistry Implementations
tasks.description: There are two ToolRegistry implementations: crates/core/src/tool.rs (~1025 lines) and crates/tools/src/registry.rs (~2288 lines). Need to audit and determine which is the canonical implementation. Steps: 1) Read core ToolRegistry, 2) Read tools ToolRegistry, 3) Search all usages of opencode_core::ToolRegistry, 4) Verify agent runtime uses opencode_tools::ToolRegistry, 5) Determine if core::ToolRegistry is dead code, 6) If dead code, remove from core and update exports.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify agent runtime uses opencode_tools::ToolRegistry
AddRegressionTest: ensure tool execution still works after potential removal
RunTestSuite: cargo build --all-features succeeds
AddIntegrationTest: verify tool registry operations work end-to-end
tasks.impl_notes: Module: core/tools. HIGH priority - blocks release. Determine canonical implementation and remove dead code if applicable.

tasks.title: Add Route-Group Tests
tasks.description: Add explicit route group tests for server integration. Test /api/mcp/servers, /api/mcp/tools, MCP server registration, /api/config endpoints, and /api/providers endpoints.
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify /api/mcp/servers endpoint returns correct status
AddIntegrationTest: verify /api/mcp/tools endpoint lists available tools
AddIntegrationTest: verify MCP server registration workflow
AddIntegrationTest: verify /api/config endpoint handles GET/PUT
AddIntegrationTest: verify /api/providers endpoint lists providers
RunTestSuite: execute server_integration tests
tasks.impl_notes: Module: server. Reference FR-004. Add tests in existing server test structure.

tasks.title: Add Malformed Request Body Tests
tasks.description: Add tests for malformed request handling: invalid JSON body (missing required fields, extra unknown fields, wrong field types, empty body), invalid session/message IDs (operations on non-existent session, deleted session, invalid ID format).
test_criteria: AddErrorHandlingTest: verify missing required fields returns 400
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify extra unknown fields are rejected
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify wrong field types return validation error
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify empty body returns appropriate error
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify operations on non-existent session return 404
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify operations on deleted session return 410
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify invalid session ID format returns 400
RunTestSuite: execute server error handling tests
tasks.impl_notes: Module: server. Reference FR-004. Follow existing auth test patterns.

tasks.title: Add Hook Determinism Test
tasks.description: Create test for hook deterministic ordering. Register multiple plugins with different priorities, call sorted_plugin_names() 100 times, verify consistent ordering across all invocations.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: register 5+ plugins with varying priorities
AddUnitTest: call sorted_plugin_names() 100 times consecutively
AddUnitTest: assert ordering is identical across all 100 invocations
AddRegressionTest: verify priority ordering is lexicographically stable
RunTestSuite: execute sorted_plugin_names tests
tasks.impl_notes: Module: plugin. Reference FR-008. Read plugin/src/lib.rs around line 602-621.

tasks.title: Add Security Tests
tasks.description: Add security tests for SQL injection and path traversal: SQL injection in session IDs, SQL injection in message content, path traversal in file operations, ../ in paths.
test_criteria: AddErrorHandlingTest: verify SQL injection in session ID is sanitized
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify SQL injection in message content is sanitized
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify path traversal with ../ is blocked
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify path traversal in file operations returns error
AddRegressionTest: ensure sanitization does not break valid inputs
RunTestSuite: execute server security tests
tasks.impl_notes: Module: server. Reference FR-004. Test both input validation and sanitization.

tasks.title: Implement ratatui-testing BufferDiff (FR-023.2)
tasks.description: Implement BufferDiff struct for comparing two Buffers cell-by-cell. Must report exact x,y of differences, support ignoring foreground color, background color, and attributes (bold, italic, etc.), and provide human-readable diff output.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify BufferDiff compares two Buffers cell-by-cell
AddUnitTest: verify exact x,y position of differences is reported
AddUnitTest: verify ignoring foreground color option works
AddUnitTest: verify ignoring background color option works
AddUnitTest: verify ignoring attributes (bold, italic) option works
AddUnitTest: verify human-readable diff output format
AddIntegrationTest: verify diff_str() method works for string comparison
RunTestSuite: execute ratatui-testing BufferDiff tests
tasks.impl_notes: Module: ratatui-testing. Reference FR-023.2. Read current stub in diff.rs. Implement BufferDiff struct, diff() method, diff_str() method, DiffResult and CellDiff types.

tasks.title: Implement ratatui-testing StateTester (FR-023.3)
tasks.description: Implement StateTester for capturing serializable state to JSON, comparing current state to captured snapshot, and reporting mismatches with JSON diff.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify capture() method serializes state to JSON
AddUnitTest: verify assert_state() compares current to snapshot
AddUnitTest: verify assert_state_matches() returns pass on identical state
AddUnitTest: verify JSON diff is shown on mismatch
AddIntegrationTest: verify StateTester works with complex nested state
RunTestSuite: execute ratatui-testing StateTester tests
tasks.impl_notes: Module: ratatui-testing. Reference FR-023.3. Read current stub in state.rs. Implement StateTester struct, capture() method, assert_state() method, assert_state_matches() method.

tasks.title: Implement ratatui-testing TestDsl (FR-023.4)
tasks.description: Implement TestDsl struct composing PtySimulator, BufferDiff, StateTester. Must render widget to Buffer, compose PTY/BufferDiff/StateTester, provide fluent API chains, and support wait-for predicates.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify TestDsl::new() creates instance with defaults
AddUnitTest: verify with_pty() and pty_mut() methods work
AddUnitTest: verify buffer_diff() returns BufferDiff instance
AddUnitTest: verify state_tester() returns StateTester instance
AddIntegrationTest: verify render() renders widget to Buffer correctly
AddIntegrationTest: verify assert_buffer_eq() compares rendered output
AddIntegrationTest: verify send_keys() sends input to PTY
AddIntegrationTest: verify wait_for() predicate support works
AddIntegrationTest: verify capture_state() and assert_state() methods
RunTestSuite: execute ratatui-testing TestDsl tests
tasks.impl_notes: Module: ratatui-testing. Reference FR-023.4. Read current stub in dsl.rs. Implement TestDsl struct composing PtySimulator, BufferDiff, StateTester with fluent API.

tasks.title: Implement ratatui-testing CliTester (FR-023.5)
tasks.description: Implement CliTester for spawning processes with args, capturing stdout/stderr, returning exit code, and cleaning up temp directories.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify CliTester::new() creates instance
AddUnitTest: verify with_temp_dir() creates temporary directory
AddIntegrationTest: verify run() spawns process with correct args
AddIntegrationTest: verify capture_stdout() returns stdout output
AddIntegrationTest: verify capture_stderr() returns stderr output
AddIntegrationTest: verify exit code is returned correctly
AddRegressionTest: verify temp directory is cleaned up after test
RunTestSuite: execute ratatui-testing CliTester tests
tasks.impl_notes: Module: ratatui-testing. Reference FR-023.5. Read current stub in cli.rs. Implement CliTester struct with temp_dir, run() method, capture_stdout/capture_stderr methods, and CliOutput struct.

tasks.title: Release Qualification
tasks.description: Run full release qualification checklist: full test suite, clippy, formatting check, doc tests, performance benchmarks, memory profiling, security audit, documentation completeness check.
test_criteria: RunTestSuite: cargo test --all-features passes completely
AddRegressionTest: cargo clippy --all -- -D warnings passes with no warnings
AddRegressionTest: cargo fmt --all -- --check passes with correct formatting
RunTestSuite: cargo test --doc passes all doc tests
AddRegressionTest: no new compiler warnings or errors introduced
AddRegressionTest: all existing tests continue to pass
tasks.impl_notes: Phase 6 release qualification. Run after all P0/P1/P2 tasks complete.
